subcodes.first_line: The soul who, in this Day, in the name of Truth, hath freed and detached itself from whatsoever the peoples possess, verily is among the pearls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نفسیکه الیوم باسم حق خود را از ما عند الخلق فارغ و آزاد نمود او از لئالی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @pain of love; love as veil, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
